title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Dishis Designer Jewellery

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Dishis Designer Jewellery
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
